---
title: "Dashboard"
page-layout: full
---

<span class="dashboard-label">First Responder Presumptive Laws — Interactive Map</span>

::: {.dashboard-frame}
<iframe
  src="dashboard/index.html"
  style="width:100%; height:1100px; border:none; display:block;"
  title="First Responder Presumptive Laws Interactive Map">
</iframe>
:::
